feed.title: Journal of World Languages
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of World Languages (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Sound and meaning: sound semiotics across contexts
entry.summary: Authors: Y. J. Doran, Thu Ngo, Lilián I. Ariztimuño DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2026-0007 Pages: Page range: 1-8

entry.title: Three sound bites: avenues for research in the study of speech, music, and other sounds
entry.summary: Authors: Theo van Leeuwen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0037 Pages: Page range: 9-27

entry.title: How do we communicate emotions in spoken language? Modelling affectual vocal qualities in storytelling
entry.summary: Authors: Lilián I. Ariztimuño DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0041 Pages: Page range: 28-68

entry.title: “Pass me the ball”: vocal sounds and language-in-action in sport
entry.summary: Authors: David Caldwell DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0046 Pages: Page range: 69-94

entry.title: War(n/m)ing the room: the role of vocal sound semiotics in nuancing comedian-audience relations
entry.summary: Authors: Lorenzo Logi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0038 Pages: Page range: 95-126

entry.title: Punctuating text: demarcating information through vocal and non-vocal sound
entry.summary: Authors: Y. J. Doran, Susan Hood, Lilián I. Ariztimuño DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0039 Pages: Page range: 127-155

entry.title: The contributions of sound to the semiosis of a young man with a severe intellectual disability
entry.summary: Authors: Shoshana Dreyfus, Lilián I. Ariztimuño DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0040 Pages: Page range: 156-184

entry.title: Language of film sounds: developing a metalanguage for talking about film sounds as literary devices in the language arts classes
entry.summary: Authors: Thu Ngo DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0042 Pages: Page range: 185-209

entry.title: On the politics of “music theory” and the implications of its importation into research on music and meaning
entry.summary: Authors: Joshua Han DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jwl-2025-0049 Pages: Page range: 210-259
